description: Six UI fixes: slider alignment, turn popup spacing, harvest hex width, region modal 3-figure margins, shinto icon glow, politics track overflow
steps: In src/components/ActionPanel.tsx: Added minWidth: '5.5em' to both bribe and request label spans
In src/components/GameBoard.tsx: Changed marginTop: '-16px' to marginTop: '-20px'
In src/App.css: Changed .harvest-hex width from 76px to 88px
In src/components/RegionDetailModal.tsx: Added marginLeft: '135px' to first figure and marginRight: '135px' to last figure when 3 figures in front layer
In src/components/TemplePanel.tsx: Changed SVG filter to colored glow using figColor
In src/App.css: Added overflow:visible to .politics-track and z-index:10;position:relative to .game-header
acceptance_criteria: npx vite build succeeds with no errors
First figure in 3-figure front layout has marginLeft:'135px', last has marginRight:'135px'
Shinto torii SVG icons use colored glow filter with figColor
findings: All changes implemented and verified successfully.
